'''Cathacatin''' was a [[Paqwe]] from [[Paqwepori]] and part of [[Belezaboth Ourn]]'s diplomatic consul to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. He was a licensed breeder-keeper of [[Toko bird]]s and killed all the remaining ones before returning home to keep them from suffering.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
